homepage_canonical_policy.zh_path_policy: /zh is not a competing canonical; it should redirect or remain excluded from URL Truth canonical exposure.
homepage_canonical_policy.x_default_policy: Root resolves to the zh-CN home surface unless a frontend renderer explicitly emits a different valid policy.

sitemap_source.rule: Backend sitemap generator emits content_pages only when the same authority requirements pass.

en_parity_00_p0_baseline_decisions.authority_action: backend URL Truth and sitemap can now expose only published/indexable content_pages authority rows.
Backend URL Truth can represent support as a content_page only if CMS/content_pages authority exists; frontend gateway-only support remains outside backend content authority.
No content_page URL Truth record is emitted without an explicit published help-about content page.

remaining_deferred_items.reason: Actual public HTTP status, notFound rendering, redirect behavior, and metadata emission are generated by fap-web routes and must be verified or fixed in a linked frontend PR if backend authority is present but runtime remains divergent.
This PR does not create full content page bodies; it only ensures backend authority rows are represented safely when they exist.
Counterpart matching beyond content_pages URL exposure remains a dedicated translation group/read-model task.
